name: github-issue-payment-timeout
title: payment-service times out under load when calling the fraud-check API
body:
Under peak traffic, payment-service requests to the external fraud-check API exceed the 2s timeout and cascade into 500s for checkout. Related to the retry storm described in #198.

The synchronous call to fraud-check blocks the request thread; we should consider making it async or adding a circuit breaker. Affects the checkout flow in the storefront.
